ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (F for Female, M for Male) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled in the study */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the participant's data was last updated */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Parent's name */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Parent's contact information */,
  "location" TEXT /* Participant's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level corresponding to the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cognitive_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cognitive test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the cognitive test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cognitive test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the cognitive test (e.g., reading comprehension, memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cognitive test */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the participant */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "raw_score" INTEGER /* Raw score obtained by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES cognitive_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain score */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the cognitive domain (e.g., OD-40, OD-60, OD-80) */,
  "score_40" INTEGER /* Score at difficulty level 40 */,
  "score_60" INTEGER /* Score at difficulty level 60 */,
  "score_80" INTEGER /* Score at difficulty level 80 */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "domain_type" TEXT /* Type of the cognitive domain (e.g., memory, problem-solving) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_domains_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "project_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project participant association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled in the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant in the project (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the participant withdrew from the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant whose data was accessed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the test category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the test category (e.g., reading, math) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories_tests" (
  "category_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category-test association */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test category */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cognitive test */,
  "category_test_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the category-test association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_categories_tests_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_categories_tests_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES cognitive_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_difficulties" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Level of difficulty (e.g., 40, 60, 80) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_difficulties_scores" (
  "difficulty_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty score */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cognitive test */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the difficulty level */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the participant */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "raw_score" INTEGER /* Raw score obtained by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_difficulties_scores_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_id") REFERENCES test_difficulties ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_difficulties_scores_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES cognitive_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_difficulties_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the research method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the research method (e.g., longitudinal, cross-sectional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_methods" (
  "project_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-method association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research method */,
  "project_method_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the project-method association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_methods_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES research_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_methods_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cognitive test */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric (e.g., accuracy, reliability) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES cognitive_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log event */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log event occurred */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Description of the log event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
